programmes.show_description: Cuireann an t-iriseoir Andréa spéis sna déagóirí atá ar bhainis Enedina Arellano. (Journalist Andréa takes an interest in the teen guests at Enedina Arellano's wedding.)
Sraith cheoil á cur i láthair ag Cormac de Barra. (A slick music series presented by Cormac de Barra.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Is in Acaill a bheidh Áine an tseachtain seo, áit a rachaidh sí ag snámh le grúpa áitiúil. (Áine is in Achill as she explores the west coast and the communities that work there.)
Buaicphointí ó chluichí CLG an deireadh seachtaine cluichí ceannais na sraitheanna Allianz san áireamh.(Highlights of the weekend's GAA action including the Allianz league finals.)
I measc na ngúnaí pósta anocht tá ceann a bheadh feiliúnach don chairpéad dearg. (Real-life tales of Irish brides told through the stories of the dresses.)

programmes.show_name: Plant the Planet - GAA in Uganda
programmes.show_description: Clár faisnéise ina bhfeictear mar a thugann an spórt daoine le chéile ar fud an domhain. (A captivating documentary where we witness how sport unites cultures worldwide.)

Tá Clúmh ag iarraidh chuile shórt a aimsíonn Bréidín a ithe! (Fluff is trying to eat everything Tweedy finds.)
Tuigeann na Singalings gur maith an rud é a bheith ag athchúrsáil agus go bhfuil píosa spraoi ann freisin! (The Singalings know that recycling is good to do and fun too!)

Mar a chuireann aisteoirí a gcuid mothúchán in iúl a fhiosróidh Abby agus Rudy inniu. (Abby and Rudy are learning how actors show their emotions.)
Buann Posy rás cé nár rith sí an cúrsa ar fad. (Posy wins a sledge race by missing part of the course and tries to keep her secret.)

Beidh cúnamh ag teastáil ó Ricky inniu! (Today, Ricky wants to get help from Dino-Man!)
